column.name: description_en
column.value: Prime Minister of India. MP from Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh. Leader of BJP. Serving his third consecutive term as PM since 2024.

column.name: description_hi
column.value: भारत के प्रधानमंत्री। वाराणसी, उत्तर प्रदेश से सांसद। 2024 में तीसरी बार प्रधानमंत्री बने।

column.name: party_entity_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM entities WHERE slug='bjp') AS _tmp)

column.name: entity_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM entities WHERE slug='narendra-modi') AS _tmp)

column.name: education
column.value: BA Political Science, Delhi University; MA Political Science, Gujarat University

column.name: description_en
column.value: Leader of Opposition in Lok Sabha. MP from Rae Bareli, Uttar Pradesh. INC leader and former party president.

column.name: description_hi
column.value: लोकसभा में विपक्ष के नेता। रायबरेली, उत्तर प्रदेश से सांसद। INC नेता।

column.name: party_entity_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM entities WHERE slug='inc') AS _tmp)

column.name: entity_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM entities WHERE slug='rahul-gandhi') AS _tmp)

column.name: education
column.value: BA History, St. Stephen's College, Delhi; MA Development Studies, Cambridge; MPhil, Cambridge

column.name: description_en
column.value: Union Home and Cooperation Minister. MP from Gandhinagar, Gujarat. National President of BJP (2014-2020).

column.name: description_hi
column.value: केंद्रीय गृह और सहकारिता मंत्री। गांधीनगर, गुजरात से सांसद।

column.name: party_entity_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM entities WHERE slug='bjp') AS _tmp)

column.name: entity_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM entities WHERE slug='amit-shah') AS _tmp)

column.name: description_en
column.value: Union Defence Minister. MP from Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh. Former Home Minister and BJP National President.

column.name: description_hi
column.value: केंद्रीय रक्षा मंत्री। लखनऊ, उत्तर प्रदेश से सांसद।

column.name: party_entity_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM entities WHERE slug='bjp') AS _tmp)

column.name: entity_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM entities WHERE slug='rajnath-singh') AS _tmp)

column.name: description_en
column.value: Union Minister for Road Transport and Highways. MP from Nagpur, Maharashtra. Known for highway infrastructure transformation.

column.name: description_hi
column.value: केंद्रीय सड़क परिवहन और राजमार्ग मंत्री। नागपुर, महाराष्ट्र से सांसद।

column.name: party_entity_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM entities WHERE slug='bjp') AS _tmp)

column.name: entity_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM entities WHERE slug='nitin-gadkari') AS _tmp)

column.name: education
column.value: BCom, Commerce College Nagpur; LLB, Nagpur University; MBA, Institute of Management, Nagpur

column.name: description_en
column.value: MP from Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala. INC leader, author, former UN Under-Secretary General. Chairs Parliamentary Standing Committee on IT.

column.name: description_hi
column.value: तिरुवनंतपुरम, केरल से सांसद। INC नेता, लेखक, पूर्व संयुक्त राष्ट्र अवर महासचिव।

column.name: party_entity_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM entities WHERE slug='inc') AS _tmp)

column.name: entity_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM entities WHERE slug='shashi-tharoor') AS _tmp)

column.name: education
column.value: BA History, St. Stephen's College; MA International Relations, Tufts; PhD International Relations, Tufts

column.name: description_en
column.value: MP from Kannauj, Uttar Pradesh. President of Samajwadi Party. Former Chief Minister of UP (2012-2017).

column.name: description_hi
column.value: कन्नौज, उत्तर प्रदेश से सांसद। समाजवादी पार्टी के अध्यक्ष। UP के पूर्व मुख्यमंत्री (2012-2017)।

column.name: party_entity_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM entities WHERE slug='sp') AS _tmp)

column.name: entity_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM entities WHERE slug='akhilesh-yadav') AS _tmp)

column.name: education
column.value: BTech Environmental Engineering, Mysore University; MS Environmental Engineering, University of Sydney

column.name: description_en
column.value: MP from Wayanad, Kerala (Nov 2024 bypoll). INC General Secretary. First election win in November 2024.

column.name: description_hi
column.value: वायनाड, केरल से सांसद (नवंबर 2024 उपचुनाव)। INC महासचिव। नवंबर 2024 में पहली बार सांसद बनीं।

column.name: party_entity_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM entities WHERE slug='inc') AS _tmp)

column.name: entity_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM entities WHERE slug='priyanka-gandhi-vadra') AS _tmp)

column.name: education
column.value: BA Psychology, Jesus and Mary College, Delhi; PG Psychology, Delhi University

column.name: description_en
column.value: MP from Baramati, Maharashtra. Daughter of Sharad Pawar. Working President of NCP (Sharad Pawar faction).

column.name: description_hi
column.value: बारामती, महाराष्ट्र से सांसद। शरद पवार की पुत्री। NCP (एसपी) की कार्यकारी अध्यक्ष।

column.name: party_entity_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM entities WHERE slug='ncp-sp') AS _tmp)

column.name: entity_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM entities WHERE slug='supriya-sule') AS _tmp)

column.name: education
column.value: BA, University of California, Berkeley; MBA, Santa Clara University

column.name: description_en
column.value: Speaker of the 18th Lok Sabha. MP from Kota-Bundi, Rajasthan. Re-elected Speaker in June 2024.

column.name: description_hi
column.value: 18वीं लोकसभा के अध्यक्ष। कोटा-बूंदी, राजस्थान से सांसद। जून 2024 में पुनः अध्यक्ष चुने गए।

column.name: party_entity_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM entities WHERE slug='bjp') AS _tmp)

column.name: entity_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM entities WHERE slug='om-birla') AS _tmp)

column.name: education
column.value: BCom, Commerce College Kota; MA Political Science, Rajasthan University

column.name: description_en
column.value: MP from Hyderabad, Telangana. President of AIMIM. Five-term MP known for sharp parliamentary debates.

column.name: description_hi
column.value: हैदराबाद, तेलंगाना से सांसद। AIMIM के अध्यक्ष। पांच बार सांसद।

column.name: party_entity_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM entities WHERE slug='aimim') AS _tmp)

column.name: entity_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM entities WHERE slug='asaduddin-owaisi') AS _tmp)

column.name: description_en
column.value: MP from Mandi, Himachal Pradesh. National Award-winning actress turned politician. Elected on BJP ticket in 2024.

column.name: description_hi
column.value: मंडी, हिमाचल प्रदेश से सांसद। राष्ट्रीय पुरस्कार विजेता अभिनेत्री। 2024 में BJP से चुनाव जीता।

column.name: party_entity_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM entities WHERE slug='bjp') AS _tmp)

column.name: entity_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM entities WHERE slug='kangana-ranaut') AS _tmp)

column.name: description_en
column.value: MP from Mainpuri, Uttar Pradesh. Wife of Akhilesh Yadav, daughter-in-law of Mulayam Singh Yadav. SP leader.

column.name: description_hi
column.value: मैनपुरी, उत्तर प्रदेश से सांसद। अखिलेश यादव की पत्नी, मुलायम सिंह यादव की पुत्रवधू।

column.name: party_entity_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM entities WHERE slug='sp') AS _tmp)

column.name: entity_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM entities WHERE slug='dimple-yadav') AS _tmp)

column.name: description_en
column.value: Chief Minister of Uttar Pradesh. MLA from Gorakhpur Urban. BJP leader and Hindu monk. CM since 2017.

column.name: description_hi
column.value: उत्तर प्रदेश के मुख्यमंत्री। गोरखपुर शहरी से विधायक। BJP नेता। 2017 से CM।

column.name: party_entity_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM entities WHERE slug='bjp') AS _tmp)

column.name: entity_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM entities WHERE slug='yogi-adityanath') AS _tmp)

column.name: description_en
column.value: Chief Minister of Maharashtra since December 2024. MLA from Nagpur South-West. BJP leader. Former CM (2014-2019).

column.name: description_hi
column.value: दिसंबर 2024 से महाराष्ट्र के मुख्यमंत्री। नागपुर दक्षिण-पश्चिम से विधायक। BJP नेता।

column.name: party_entity_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM entities WHERE slug='bjp') AS _tmp)

column.name: entity_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM entities WHERE slug='devendra-fadnavis') AS _tmp)

column.name: education
column.value: BCom, Nagpur University; LLB, Nagpur University; MBA, Institute of Management, Nagpur

column.name: description_en
column.value: MLA from Tonk, Rajasthan. INC leader. Former Deputy Chief Minister of Rajasthan and former Union Minister.

column.name: description_hi
column.value: टोंक, राजस्थान से विधायक। INC नेता। राजस्थान के पूर्व उपमुख्यमंत्री।

column.name: party_entity_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM entities WHERE slug='inc') AS _tmp)

column.name: entity_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM entities WHERE slug='sachin-pilot') AS _tmp)

column.name: education
column.value: BA, St. Stephen's College Delhi; MBA, Wharton School, University of Pennsylvania

column.name: description_en
column.value: MLA from Jhalrapatan, Rajasthan. BJP leader. Former Chief Minister of Rajasthan (2003-2008, 2013-2018).

column.name: description_hi
column.value: झालरापाटन, राजस्थान से विधायक। BJP नेता। राजस्थान की पूर्व मुख्यमंत्री (दो बार)।

column.name: party_entity_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM entities WHERE slug='bjp') AS _tmp)

column.name: entity_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM entities WHERE slug='vasundhara-raje') AS _tmp)

column.name: education
column.value: BA Economics, Sophia College Mumbai; Maharani Gayatri Devi School Jaipur

column.name: description_en
column.value: MLA from Kalkaji, Delhi. AAP leader. Served as Delhi CM (Sept-Dec 2024). Former Education and Finance Minister.

column.name: description_hi
column.value: कालकाजी, दिल्ली से विधायक। AAP नेता। दिल्ली की पूर्व मुख्यमंत्री (2024)। पूर्व शिक्षा और वित्त मंत्री।

column.name: party_entity_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM entities WHERE slug='aap') AS _tmp)

column.name: entity_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM entities WHERE slug='atishi') AS _tmp)

column.name: education
column.value: BA History, St. Stephen's College Delhi; MA History, Oxford University

column.name: description_en
column.value: MLA from Worli, Mumbai, Maharashtra. Shiv Sena (UBT) leader. Son of Uddhav Thackeray. Former Cabinet Minister.

column.name: description_hi
column.value: वर्ली, मुंबई, महाराष्ट्र से विधायक। शिव सेना (UBT) नेता। उद्धव ठाकरे के पुत्र।

column.name: party_entity_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM entities WHERE slug='shiv-sena-ubt') AS _tmp)

column.name: entity_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM entities WHERE slug='aaditya-thackeray') AS _tmp)

column.name: education
column.value: BA Economics, Mumbai University; Law, Mumbai University
